tone: Modern Agritech Operations Console, Professional, Grounded, Efficient

layout.spacing_system: Generous padding: p-4 to p-8. Tight gaps for Control Room: gap-4 to gap-6.
layout.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-border/50 bg-surface h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 flex flex-col
layout.card_style: bg-surface border border-border/40 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

data_table.header: bg-secondary text-text_secondary uppercase tracking-wider text-xs py-3 px-4

button_primary.style: bg-primary text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors

badge.style: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-secondary text-primary border border-primary/20

auth.layout: Split screen: left side branded abstract agriculture tech image, right side clean login form.

poultry_management.batch_card: Includes mortality progress bar (turns terracotta if > threshold), age in days badge, feed consumption sparkline.

water_distribution.tank_inventory: Cards with vertical progress bars for current liters vs capacity. Uses blue accent (#0284C7).
water_distribution.lorry_card: Status indicator (transit, idle, maintenance), assigned driver avatar, current route.

inventory.low_stock_alert: Highlight row or card with clay/terracotta border and alert icon.

finance.pnl_statement: Dense, Control Room style table layout with bold subtotal rows.

images.description: Rows of green crops in field at sunset. Use as abstract background for Auth/Login screen or hero banners.
White chicken on green grass field. Use in poultry module empty states or headers.
Truck with water bottles. Use in water distribution module empty states or logistics dashboard.

accessibility.contrast: All text meets APCA guidelines against backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette to achieve the 'Agri Green' agritech theme. Map these hex codes as CSS variables.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Manrope for body text. Do NOT use Inter. You can use standard Google Fonts loading or import them in CSS.
Remember that the project uses React with pure .js/.jsx files (not TypeScript / .tsx). Do not write TypeScript syntax.
Build a sidebar layout with a solid off-white/sage-tinted main content background. Dashboard should feel like a dense, reliable operations console.
Apply Control Room grid density for the main dashboard (tight gaps like gap-6, fully utilized space).
For KPI Cards, use the specific typography: large tight value, small tracking-[0.2em] uppercase label.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all forms, buttons, links, and interactive cards for testing.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to remove the default 'Vercel-look'. Remove heavy shadows, use flat surfaces with 1px solid borders.
For Water Distribution module, introduce the Blue accent color (#0284C7) to distinguish from the green-heavy Poultry module.
Use the provided image URLs for auth screen split layout and module empty states.
